headline: 1 Healthcare Stock with Promising Prospects and 2 Facing Headwinds
summary: Healthcare companies are pushing the status quo by innovating in areas like drug development and digital health. Those leading the charge have not only realized strong financial performance but also propelled the broader industry’s returns as healthcare stocks have gained 5.1% over the past six months while the S&P 500 was up 3.5%.

headline: ISRG Stock Down Nearly 20% YTD: Should You Buy, Hold or Sell?
summary: ISRG slides nearly 20% YTD despite strong procedure growth and upgrades, as valuation concerns and macro pressures weigh on near-term upside.

headline: Stryker is fully operational after cyberattack
summary: The company disclosed that it expects a material impact on first-quarter financial results. However, it does not expect an effect on full-year results.

raw.headline: Stryker is fully operational after cyberattack
raw.summary: The company disclosed that it expects a material impact on first-quarter financial results. However, it does not expect an effect on full-year results.

headline: Stryker warns of earnings fallout from March cyberattack
summary: The medtech company was targeted in a wiper attack linked to an Iran-sponsored threat group.

raw.headline: Stryker warns of earnings fallout from March cyberattack
raw.summary: The medtech company was targeted in a wiper attack linked to an Iran-sponsored threat group.

headline: Insulet Taps Mike Panos To Drive Omnipod Commercial Execution And Growth
summary: Insulet (NasdaqGS:PODD) has appointed Mike Panos as Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer. Panos joins the company with three decades of commercial leadership experience at Stryker. The new appointment is aimed at supporting global commercial expansion and execution for Insulet’s insulin delivery business. Insulet focuses on automated insulin delivery systems, a segment that sits at the intersection of medical devices and diabetes care technology. As interest in wearable and...
